close_reason: Added test and remote_test_execution toolchains. Tests work for Go, Rust, and Python.
description:
Add a test toolchain to the Buck2 toolchains cell so that go_test, rust_test, python_test etc. targets can be run via buck2 test.

Currently buck2 test fails with:
```
Unknown target `test` from package `toolchains//`.
```

Need to add test runner configuration to:
- .turnkey/toolchains/BUCK
- Possibly toolchains cell generation in nix/buck2/toolchains-cell.nix

Reference the prelude's test toolchain patterns.
title: Add test toolchain to Buck2 configuration
